title: Internal role contour audit v2
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem531_internal_role_contour_audit.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem531_internal_role_contour_audit_v2.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

core_files = ['governance/INTERNAL_CONTOUR_REFERENCE.md','governance/state/role_cycle_state.json','governance/transport/results.jsonl','.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml','.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml','.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml','governance/GPT_HANDOFF.md','governance/GPT_WRITE_CHANNEL.md']
inventory=[]
missing=[]
texts={}
for name in core_files:
    p=Path(name)
    if p.exists():
        txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        texts[name]=txt
        inventory.append('- '+name+': exists, bytes='+str(len(txt)))
    else:
        missing.append(name)
        texts[name]=''
        inventory.append('- '+name+': MISSING')

transport_lines=[]
tdir=Path('governance/transport')
if tdir.exists():
    for f in sorted(tdir.rglob('*'), key=lambda x: str(x)):
        if f.is_file():
            transport_lines.append('- '+str(f)+': bytes='+str(len(f.read_text(errors='ignore'))))
else:
    transport_lines.append('- governance/transport: MISSING')

workflow_checks=[]
schedule_hits=[]
for wf in ['.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml','.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml','.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml']:
    txt=texts.get(wf,'')
    has_dispatch='workflow_dispatch' in txt
    has_schedule='schedule:' in txt
    has_issue_entry='issue_comment' in txt
    workflow_checks.append('- '+wf+': dispatch='+str(has_dispatch)+', schedule='+str(has_schedule)+', issue_entry='+str(has_issue_entry))
    if has_schedule:
        schedule_hits.append(wf)

role_state={}
role_state_error=None
rp=Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
if rp.exists():
    try:
        role_state=json.loads(rp.read_text())
    except Exception as e:
        role_state_error=str(e)

results_path=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
result_lines=[]
if results_path.exists():
    for line in results_path.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()[-20:]:
        if line.strip():
            result_lines.append(line[:500])

ref=texts.get('governance/INTERNAL_CONTOUR_REFERENCE.md','')+'\n'+texts.get('.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml','')+'\n'+texts.get('.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml','')+'\n'+json.dumps(role_state, ensure_ascii=False)
role_terms={}
low=ref.lower()
role_terms['analyst']='analyst' in low or 'аналитик' in low
role_terms['auditor']='auditor' in low or 'аудитор' in low
role_terms['executor']='executor' in low or 'исполнитель' in low
role_terms['role_orchestrator']='role-orchestrator' in ref or 'role_orchestrator' in ref
role_terms['provider_adapter']='provider-adapter' in ref or 'provider_adapter' in ref
role_terms['file_transport']='transport' in low or 'results.jsonl' in ref
role_terms['role_state_json_valid']=role_state_error is None and rp.exists()
role_terms['transport_results_exists']=results_path.exists()
role_terms['no_schedule_triggers']=len(schedule_hits)==0

completed=[]
gaps=[]
if role_terms['analyst'] and role_terms['auditor'] and role_terms['executor']:
    completed.append('Roles analyst, auditor and executor are present in docs/workflows/state')
else:
    gaps.append('Role terminology or role wiring is incomplete')
if role_terms['role_orchestrator']:
    completed.append('Role orchestrator is present')
else:
    gaps.append('Role orchestrator not confirmed')
if role_terms['provider_adapter']:
    completed.append('Provider adapter is present')
else:
    gaps.append('Provider adapter not confirmed')
if role_terms['file_transport'] and role_terms['transport_results_exists']:
    completed.append('File-based transport exists via governance/transport/results.jsonl')
else:
    gaps.append('File transport is incomplete or empty')
if role_terms['role_state_json_valid']:
    completed.append('role_cycle_state.json is readable JSON')
else:
    gaps.append('role_cycle_state.json missing or invalid: '+str(role_state_error))
if schedule_hits:
    gaps.append('Schedule triggers found: '+', '.join(schedule_hits))
else:
    completed.append('No schedule triggers found in inspected workflows')

status='PASS' if not missing and role_terms['role_state_json_valid'] and role_terms['transport_results_exists'] and not schedule_hits else 'PARTIAL'
role_state_summary=json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)[:6000]

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-531 | Internal Role Contour Improvement Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:35 (UTC+3)\n\n## Объект\nВнутренний контур разработки: analyst -> auditor -> executor -> GitHub Actions -> file transport -> role state. Это не внешний GPT autonomy contour.\n\n## Цель\nДовести внутренний мультиагентный контур до проверяемого E2E состояния, где роли создают артефакты, передают их через файловый транспорт, executor применяет изменения, auditor подтверждает, state обновляется.\n\n## Дорожная карта доработок\n\n### BEM-531.1 — Role state schema audit and normalization\nПроверить и нормализовать governance/state/role_cycle_state.json: active_role, cycle_id, current_task, handoff pointers, status history, blocker, timestamps.\nPASS: schema report, normalized state, backward-compatible fields.\n\n### BEM-531.2 — File transport contract\nФормализовать inbox/outbox/result файлы для ролей и стандартизировать JSONL schema.\nPASS: transport protocol + sample records + validator proof.\n\n### BEM-531.3 — Role orchestrator workflow audit\nПроверить role-orchestrator.yml: triggers, inputs, state read/write, no schedule, no issue #31, routing analyst/auditor/executor.\nPASS: audit report + patch if required.\n\n### BEM-531.4 — Provider adapter workflow audit\nПроверить provider-adapter.yml: provider routing, file transport write, failure handling, no paid API by default, no secrets leakage.\nPASS: audit report + patch if required.\n\n### BEM-531.5 — Synthetic role cycle E2E\nСоздать тестовую задачу: analyst analysis -> auditor review -> executor file patch -> auditor final PASS -> transport result.\nPASS: all role artifacts exist, role_cycle_state updated, result record appended, blocker=null.\n\n### BEM-531.6 — Internal contour dashboard\nСоздать governance/internal_contour/status.md: роли, последний cycle, last result, blockers, next role.\nPASS: dashboard generated from state/transport files.\n\n## Приоритет\n1. BEM-531.1 state schema.\n2. BEM-531.2 file transport contract.\n3. BEM-531.3/531.4 workflows.\n4. BEM-531.5 synthetic E2E.\n5. BEM-531.6 dashboard.\n\n## Ограничения\nNo issue #31 comments. No schedule triggers. No secrets in files. No paid OpenAI API. Use Deno + Python executor v3 Run script.\n')

report.write_text('# BEM-531 | Internal Role-Based Contour Audit\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:35 (UTC+3)\n\n## Важное уточнение\nЭтот отчёт относится к внутреннему контуру разработки: роли analyst/auditor/executor, role-orchestrator, provider-adapter, file-based transport и role_cycle_state. Это не внешний контур автономности ChatGPT.\n\n## Статус аудита\n'+status+'\n\n## Прочитанные файлы\n'+'\n'.join(inventory)+'\n\n## Transport inventory\n'+'\n'.join(transport_lines[:80])+'\n\n## Workflow checks\n'+'\n'.join(workflow_checks)+'\n\n## Role term checks\n```json\n'+json.dumps(role_terms, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n```\n\n## role_cycle_state snapshot\n```json\n'+role_state_summary+'\n```\n\n## Последние transport results\n```text\n'+'\n'.join(result_lines)+'\n```\n\n## Что уже выполнено\n'+'\n'.join(['- '+x for x in completed])+'\n\n## Gaps / risks\n'+'\n'.join(['- '+x for x in gaps])+'\n\n## Предыдущие blockers, влияющие на внутренний контур\n- Issue #31 нельзя использовать как канал отчётов.\n- Schedule triggers запрещены.\n- Secrets нельзя хранить в файлах.\n- Codex CLI/OpenAI API отклонён для бесплатной архитектуры.\n- Для сложных state/transport операций нужен Run script executor v3.\n\n## План доработок\nСоздан: governance/tasks/pending/BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP.md\n\n## Blocker\n'+('null' if not gaps else 'Требуется выполнить roadmap BEM-531 перед заявлением E2E PASS внутреннего контура.')+'\n')

proof.write_text('BEM-531 internal role contour audit completed. status='+status+'. roadmap=governance/tasks/pending/BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP.md\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report), str(roadmap), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('audited internal role-based contour and created improvement roadmap')
"""
No issue comments.
